title: PAO HWA TRADING LTD ransomware incident

extortion.description: https://www.paohwa.com/ PAO HWA TRADING CO., LTD is a leading Taiwanese importer and distributor of comprehensive cutting tools for industries including automotive, aerospace, electronics, and mold manufacturing. The company serves as a general agent for brands such as Japan's KYOCERA and a distributor for NACHI.
